events.title: Members-Only Hour: Play at the Museum
events.description: The first hour of play from 9:00 AM - 10:00 AM is reserved exclusively for our Members on weekdays: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday and Friday. There is no Members-Only Hour during school breaks and holidays.

events.title: Asian-American & Pacific Islander Heritage Month: Animal Yoga
events.description: In May, we're celebrating Asian-American & Pacific Islander Heritage Month! During your visit, stop by the Science Bar, Art Studio, and the CMA Stage where we're highlighting Asian American leaders in science, art, and innovation! Learn about Filipino marine biologist, Edgardo Dizon Gomez, the haenyeo – an all female team of free-divers from South Korea’s&he

events.title: Crafting Community: A Character Education Workshop
events.description: Crafting Community: A Character Education Workshop Join us in the Exploration Room on Saturday, June 6 at 10:30 AM - 11:30 AM. Be part of a fun and interactive paper puppet show where families will celebrate the everyday heroes who help make our neighborhoods vibrant and joyful. Little ones will discover the many roles people play…

events.title: Sensory Friendly Playtime: Play at the Museum
events.description: Enjoy a sensory-modified playtime from 9:00 AM – 11:00 AM on Sunday, June 7! This experience includes limited admission and sound adjustments. Sensory Packs are available upon request at the Welcome Center and contain headphones, sunglasses, and a selection of sensory toys. Simply check one out with a team member upon arrival.
